_comment: Field map for commercial appraisal in ACI software (fallback).
_comment2: NOTE: Real Quantum is the primary tool for commercial appraisals. This file is a fallback in case ACI is used for a commercial assignment. Update 'label' values to match what you see in ACI if they differ.

site_description.label: Site Description
site_description.notes: Site comments — legal description, utilities, access, zoning.

improvement_description.label: Improvements
improvement_description.notes: Building class, construction type, age, condition, functional utility.

market_area.label: Market Area Analysis
market_area.notes: Submarket conditions, vacancy, absorption, rent and cap rate trends.

hbu_analysis.label: Highest and Best Use
hbu_analysis.notes: As vacant and as improved HBU conclusions.

income_approach.label: Income Approach Comments
income_approach.notes: PGI, vacancy/collection loss, EGI, expenses, NOI, cap rate, value indication.

sales_comparison.label: Sales Comparison Analysis
sales_comparison.notes: Comparable selection rationale, unit of comparison, adjustment discussion.

cost_approach.label: Cost Approach Comments
cost_approach.notes: Land value, replacement cost new, depreciation categories.

reconciliation.label: Reconciliation
reconciliation.notes: Weight of approaches, final reconciliation, value conclusion.
